div1.entryFree: Callot or Callat or Callet, a woman of bad character, a trull: a c. of boundless tongue, Wint. II, 3, 90. contemptuous base-born c. as she is, H6B I, 3, 86. to make this shameless c. know herself, H6C II, 2, 145. a beggar in his drink could not have laid such terms upon his c. Oth. IV, 2, 121.
